project.name: axis-toolbox
project.tagline: The operating system for AI-native development

architecture.database: SQLite (better-sqlite3, WAL mode, 5 tables: snapshots, projects, accounts, billings, webhooks)
architecture.frontend_framework: React 19 + Vite 6, vanilla CSS dark theme

critical_paths: axis_all_tools.yaml — canonical program specs (golden source of truth)
continuation.yaml — live state ledger (session ground truth)

deployment.api: Render (Docker, starter plan, Oregon, /data/axis.db persistent volume)
deployment.ci: GitHub Actions (Node 20/22 matrix, coverage, Docker build validation)

invariants: Canonical coherence > speed — no shallow demo wins over integrated capability
One vertical at a time — monolithic vertical saturation
Evidence required for promotion — code reference + validation + export artifact
Snapshot is single source — all programs read snapshot, no re-parsing
continuation.yaml is ground truth — read on entry, update on exit
Select single highest-ROI always — one remedial action per cycle
Same input → byte-identical output — deterministic generators
Per-program billing — each program is a separate SKU
MEMORY.yaml is constitutional — read on folder entry, update on exit
Free gives diagnosis, paid gives execution

packages.name: snapshots
packages.role: Intake, SQLite persistence, billing state, funnel tracking

packages.name: repo-parser
packages.role: Language detection (60+), framework detection (10+), import resolution

packages.name: context-engine
packages.role: Context map builder, repo-profile builder, route extraction, architecture analysis

packages.name: generator-core
packages.role: Template engine + 80 generators (17 modules, one per program)

apps.name: api
apps.role: Node.js HTTP server, zero-dep router, 75+ endpoints, port 4000

apps.name: cli
apps.role: Command-line tool: axis analyze <dir>, axis github <url>

apps.name: web
apps.role: React 19 SPA, dark theme, upload + dashboard, port 5173
